underlying_goal: Fix DLP rule engine NOT-entity eviction bug (rules with NOT entities should evict early), wire RuleEngineCfg through the config pipeline, generate per-case test data files, and verify across all test interfaces
friction_detail: Initial test run used stale binary from default obj/ dir instead of obj2/, requiring re-run with correct --obj-dir.
brief_summary: User wanted a NOT-entity eviction bug fixed plus per-case test data generated and validated across asp/rest/async interfaces; all 184 matrix cases pass and work was committed and pushed.
